text: Immersed in the interplay of color, glass, and light, I feel a sense of curiosity—drawn by the glowing laboratory beyond the transparent wall. Entering the vibrant R+D exhibit, I am aware of the anticipation all around me. The atmosphere buzzes with innovation and contemplation—my mind dances between the excitement of discovery and the comfort of being surrounded by inquisitive minds. Being here, I experience both awe and belonging, ready to witness the birth of new ideas.
